posts.title: Beginning of Dan Duggan's Tech Blog
posts.excerpt: Starting a blog never ranked high on my skill list. I'm not a writer and barely a reader, but after years in infrastructure and security I have more stories than excuses to stay quiet.
posts.meta_description: Dan Duggan kicks off his tech blog with a blunt overview of the IT, security, infrastructure, AI, and geopolitical topics he plans to cover—and why his anti-war stance will stay visible.
